drakkar.title: Build a Small Ships Drakkar — the longship, fastest on open water

coastal_route.title: Establish a coastal trade route — use Via Romana road markers at two port locations 1000+ blocks apart

subtitle.text: The Drowned civilization built ships that sank. You are building ships that go where you tell them to.

description: The Drakkar is the fastest Small Ships vessel on open water.
It is styled after the Viking longship — narrow, fast, aggressive.
Via Romana road markers can be placed at port locations.
Two markers 1000+ blocks apart by sea creates a fast-travel maritime route.
Combined with the road network from Ch12, your civilization now has:
- Create Teleporter prep beginning in Ch17 (instantaneous)
Infrastructure at three levels of transportation.
This is what the Oldest Civilization lacked.
They had knowledge. They did not have logistics.
The Kingdom You Built has both.
→ Establish a coastal trade route with Via Romana markers [check]
